title: Add a better way to have future LLM agets introspect runs so that they can debug them better
close_reason: Added scripts/inspect_run.py CLI: read-only introspection over dashboard DB + job logs + synced TB metrics. Subcommands: list/jobs/runs/job/run/errors/tail with --json. Falls back to conventional log paths when DB has stale absolute paths from another host. 9 unit tests pass. Documented in CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md so future Claude/agents discover it.

title: Get A* to actually work well on at least level 7
